stories.headline: Travis Hunter's Wing Is Healed, and He's Runnin' Faster Than Ever
stories.read: Hold up there, pardner, the wire's hummin': that two-way wonder in Jacksonville is set to be fully cleared when camp opens July 28, nine months after his knee gave out and the surgeons went to work. Fella's already gallopin' past 20 miles an hour, faster than he's EVER run, though the Jags aim to ease him back into the herd early in the summer. Here's the gold: a busted 2025 knocked his price down at the saloon, and a healthy Hunter with a full season of throws comin' his way is exactly the kind of vein that gushes. Stake your claim before the rest of the outfit reads this wire.

stories.headline: Schoen Swears Nabers Rides Week 1, but the Trail Says Watch Your Step
stories.read: The Giants' head man Joe Schoen is tellin' anybody who'll listen that Malik Nabers will be fine come Week 1 against Dallas, even after that torn-up knee needed a second cleanup this offseason. But read the fine print, friend: the likely path has him startin' camp laid up on the sidelines while the coaches hold their breath, and New York's been stockpilin' spare receivers like a man expectin' a hard winter. That uncertainty is drivin' his price down, and a fella with his cut of the throws don't come cheap when he's healthy. If your draft runs late in the summer and the news turns sunny, that discount closes fast, so keep one eye on this wire and one hand on your wallet.

stories.headline: Houston Promises Woody Marks a Fat Share of the Haul, Montgomery or No
stories.read: Now here's a whisper from the Texans' ranch, pardner: even after tradin' for David Montgomery to pull the big wagon, coach Danny Barrett says young Woody Marks is gettin' lots of opportunities in year two, catchin' passes on third down and even runnin' back kicks. That's a fella with a guaranteed cut of the work while the saloon's busy payin' full price for the veteran ahead of him. Marks is cheap gold late in your draft: real points every week, and the spare horse who turns bell-cow the minute Montgomery throws a wheel. That's the whole craft right there, gettin' more than you paid.
